description: A nurse administered only part of a controlled substance and needs another nurse to witness and co-sign the documentation of the wasted portion.

nodes.task_description: Document the administered portion of the medication in the MAR.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse correctly documents the dose that was given to the patient.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the 'waste' workflow for the remaining portion of the medication.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse accesses the controlled substance waste documentation module.

nodes.task_description: Have a second nurse log in, verify the amount of waste, and electronically co-sign the waste documentation.

expected_outcome.value: The waste is successfully documented and co-signed, meeting legal and safety requirements.
